title: RFC 9309 Robots Semantics and Library Conformance Adapter · Scenario Checkpoint
summary: A release reviewer compares near-miss TypeScript decisions for rfc 9309 robots semantics and library conformance adapter and accepts only compiler plus runtime changed-case evidence, explicit non-claims, and named network, DNS, browser, accessibility, security, load, legal-review, and production transfer gates. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for RFC 9309 decision adapter around robots-parser. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case pr…
objectives: Construct the RFC 9309 retrieval URL from the target service origin and send one stable truthful crawler product token with an accountable contact.
Apply group selection, percent encoding, longest-match precedence, and allow-over-disallow tie behavior from RFC 9309.
Classify successful, redirecting, unavailable, unreachable, oversized, malformed, and stale robots responses conservatively.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Robots Location Agent · changed case · Quiz Robots Location…
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz TypeScript team handles case 6932 during an origin-fairness and event-loop capacity rehearsal. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove RFC 9309 product, group, encoding, longest-match, response-state, cache, and library adapter behavior; every Promise, stream, listener, timer, socket, file, browser context, and report sink needs one cleanup owner; then change one HTML repair, Cheerio mode, selector, unknown value, record schema, link relation, or metadata case and retain rejected evidence. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.
